title: Genre Blending/Hybridization Model
description: Models how genre constraint graphs compose when a story operates in multiple genres. Each blend documents constraint dominance, compatible and conflicting constraints, tone synthesis, structural stability, and resolution strategies. Severity classifications from genre graph severity weighting inform which constraints are negotiable in blends.

compatible_constraints: Both require escalation — horror escalates threat, comedy escalates chaos
Both use audience expectation manipulation — horror subverts safety, comedy subverts logic

conflicting_constraints.resolution: Toggle between registers — comedy scenes provide relief valves between horror sequences
Protagonist is competent at comedy, incompetent at survival
Use comedy to establish false safety that horror then shatters

blends.tone_synthesis: Horror comedy oscillates between registers rather than blending them. The comedy makes the horror more shocking, and the horror gives the comedy real stakes.
blends.resolution_strategy: Scene-level alternation: comic scenes lower defenses, horror scenes exploit that vulnerability. The blend is unstable because sustained dread is impossible when comedy provides regular relief.

example_works.title: Shaun of the Dead
example_works.note: Alternates between sitcom comedy and genuine zombie horror threat

example_works.title: Get Out
example_works.note: Social comedy facade conceals escalating racial horror

compatible_constraints: Both demand emotional intensity — horror through fear, romance through desire
Both require vulnerability — horror demands physical/psychological vulnerability, romance demands emotional vulnerability
Both use isolation — horror isolates to increase danger, romance isolates to increase intimacy

conflicting_constraints.horror: Threat must escalate to endanger the protagonist (hard)
conflicting_constraints.romance: Central relationship must survive to fulfillment (hard)
conflicting_constraints.resolution: External threat endangers the relationship rather than the individuals, or one partner IS the threat
Gothic atmosphere: dread and desire become inseparable

blends.tone_synthesis: Gothic romance: dread and emotional intensity merge into a single atmospheric register where desire and danger are indistinguishable.
blends.resolution_strategy: Horror provides the external threat; romance provides the internal stakes. The protagonist must survive the horror AND achieve romantic fulfillment, or the blend fails one genre.

example_works.title: Crimson Peak
example_works.note: Gothic horror and doomed romance share the same atmospheric space

example_works.title: Rebecca
example_works.note: Psychological horror of the first wife haunts the romantic narrative

compatible_constraints: SF's technology rules provide the mechanism for horror's threat — the monster IS the science
SF's extrapolated society becomes the isolated setting horror requires
SF's intellectual engagement enhances horror's dread through understanding — the more you know, the worse it is

conflicting_constraints.resolution: Cosmic horror: intellectual understanding reveals something too terrible to face

blends.tone_synthesis: Sci-fi horror merges curiosity with dread. The intellectual engagement of understanding the threat amplifies rather than dispels the horror.
blends.resolution_strategy: SF provides the world-rules that make the threat credible and inescapable. Horror provides the emotional experience of facing that threat. The blend is stable because understanding doesn't provide safety.

example_works.title: Alien
example_works.note: SF setting provides isolation and the threat mechanism; horror provides the experience

example_works.title: Annihilation
example_works.note: Scientific investigation deepens rather than resolves the horror

compatible_constraints: Fantasy's magic system can BE the source of horror's threat
Fantasy's secondary world logic creates the alien setting horror needs
Both can operate on mythic/elemental scale

conflicting_constraints.resolution: Dark fantasy: wonder inverted — the magical world is beautiful AND terrifying

conflicting_constraints.horror: Threat logic must be internally consistent (hard)
conflicting_constraints.resolution: Aligned — the magic system's rules constrain the horror, making it more credible

blends.tone_synthesis: Dark fantasy: wonder becomes awe in the theological sense — encountering something vast, beautiful, and terrible simultaneously.
blends.resolution_strategy: Fantasy provides the world and its rules; horror provides the emotional register. Stable when the wonder serves to amplify the dread rather than dispel it.

example_works.title: Pan's Labyrinth
example_works.note: Fairy-tale wonder and wartime horror occupy the same narrative

example_works.title: The Witcher (series)
example_works.note: Fantasy world where monsters are genuinely horrifying, not just obstacles

compatible_constraints: Both require escalating stakes — thriller through danger, romance through emotional vulnerability
Both use trust dynamics — thriller manipulates trust, romance builds trust
Both require information control — thriller withholds threat information, romance withholds emotional truth

conflicting_constraints.resolution: Romantic suspense: attraction heightened by shared danger

blends.tone_synthesis: Romantic suspense: the dread of the thriller and the intensity of the romance feed each other — danger heightens attraction, attraction creates vulnerability.
blends.resolution_strategy: Thriller provides the external plot; romance provides the emotional stakes. Both must resolve satisfactorily — the threat must be defeated AND the relationship must succeed.

example_works.title: North by Northwest
example_works.note: Spy thriller and romantic comedy run on parallel tracks

example_works.title: Mr. & Mrs. Smith
example_works.note: Marital romance and action thriller share the same conflict

compatible_constraints: Both use revelation dynamics — mystery reveals hidden truth, romance reveals hidden feelings
Both require gradual deepening — mystery deepens understanding, romance deepens intimacy
Both have climactic confrontation scenes — mystery reveals the truth, romance declares love

conflicting_constraints.resolution: The investigation itself becomes the romantic arena — partners investigating together build intimacy

blends.tone_synthesis: Romantic mystery: intellectual curiosity and emotional discovery operate as parallel tracks, with investigation scenes doubling as intimacy-building scenes.
blends.resolution_strategy: The mystery provides structure (case to solve); the romance provides stakes (relationship to build). Both resolve in the climax — truth revealed AND love declared.

example_works.title: The Big Sleep
example_works.note: Marlowe's investigation is inseparable from his attraction to Vivian Rutledge

example_works.title: Bones (TV series)
example_works.note: Forensic investigation provides the structure for a slow-burn romance

compatible_constraints: SF's technology provides the tools and threats for the thriller's tension
SF's extrapolated society creates the surveillance/control dynamics thrillers exploit
Both use information asymmetry — SF withholds how technology works, thriller withholds who can be trusted

conflicting_constraints.resolution: Techno-thriller: understanding the technology increases rather than decreases the dread

blends.tone_synthesis: Techno-thriller: intellectual engagement is focused on threats and countermeasures rather than pure exploration. Understanding the system reveals how trapped you are.
blends.resolution_strategy: SF provides the world-rules that make the thriller's threats credible and specific. Thriller provides the pacing and emotional register.

example_works.title: Minority Report
example_works.note: SF precognition system provides the thriller's central tension

example_works.title: Ex Machina
example_works.note: SF AI premise creates a psychological thriller of trust and manipulation

compatible_constraints: Historical period provides the social barriers romance requires
Historical social hierarchy creates the class/status obstacles romance thrives on
Both require emotional authenticity within their respective constraints

conflicting_constraints.historical: Characters must behave within period-accurate social norms (hard)
conflicting_constraints.romance: Central relationship must achieve emotional fulfillment (hard)
conflicting_constraints.resolution: The period's restrictions ARE the romance's obstacles — overcoming social constraints IS the romantic arc

blends.tone_synthesis: Period romance: the formality and constraint of the era amplify the emotional charge of every stolen moment and forbidden feeling.
blends.resolution_strategy: Historical setting provides the obstacles and atmosphere; romance provides the emotional arc. The period's constraints make the romance more difficult and therefore more satisfying.

example_works.title: Pride and Prejudice
example_works.note: Regency social constraints are the romance's obstacles

example_works.title: Outlander
example_works.note: 18th-century Scotland provides the danger and social constraint for the romance

compatible_constraints: Both use moral ambiguity — crime in the criminal world, thriller in trust dynamics
Both require escalating stakes and narrowing options
Both use information asymmetry as a primary tension tool

conflicting_constraints.resolution: Aligned — crime's moral weight and thriller's dread reinforce each other

blends.tone_synthesis: Crime thriller: moral weight intensifies dread, and dread makes moral choices more desperate. The blend is inherently stable because both genres share structural DNA.
blends.resolution_strategy: Crime provides the world and its moral rules; thriller provides the pacing and tension mechanics. Both resolve through confrontation with the truth.

example_works.title: No Country for Old Men
example_works.note: Crime world provides the stakes; thriller provides the relentless pacing

example_works.title: Heat
example_works.note: Crime procedural and thriller mechanics are inseparable

compatible_constraints: Fantasy's magical barriers can serve as romance's obstacles
Both operate on heightened emotional registers
Fantasy's transformation themes align with romance's personal growth through love

conflicting_constraints.fantasy: Magic system must have rules and costs (hard)
conflicting_constraints.resolution: The magic system's costs create romantic obstacles — love requires paying the magical price
Alternate focus by act — establish world, then deepen relationship within it

blends.tone_synthesis: Romantic fantasy: wonder enhances the emotional intensity of romance, and the magical world provides metaphors for internal emotional states.
blends.resolution_strategy: Fantasy provides the world and its unique obstacles; romance provides the emotional arc. Both must resolve — the magical conflict must be won AND the relationship must succeed.

example_works.title: The Princess Bride
example_works.note: Fantasy adventure and true love romance are equally weighted

example_works.title: A Court of Thorns and Roses
example_works.note: Fae fantasy world provides the obstacles and setting for romance

compatible_constraints: Both require social dynamics and interpersonal misunderstanding
Both escalate through misunderstanding and revelation
Both resolve through recognition and reconciliation

conflicting_constraints.resolution: The embarrassment and misunderstanding are recoverable; the love is real

blends.tone_synthesis: Romantic comedy: playfulness provides the texture, emotional intensity provides the depth. The comedy makes the romance accessible; the romance gives the comedy stakes.
blends.resolution_strategy: This is one of the most naturally stable blends. Comedy's restoration of order and romance's achievement of union are structurally identical — the couple getting together IS the harmony restored.

example_works.title: When Harry Met Sally
example_works.note: Comic observations about relationships carry genuine romantic stakes

example_works.title: Much Ado About Nothing
example_works.note: Shakespeare's comedy and romance are inseparable

compatible_constraints: Fantasy's secondary world IS the adventure's uncharted territory
Both require escalating challenges through varied environments
Both value discovery and wonder as primary emotional experiences

conflicting_constraints.fantasy: Magic must have rules and costs (hard)
conflicting_constraints.resolution: Aligned — magical environments present magical physical challenges

blends.tone_synthesis: Fantasy adventure: excitement and wonder combine naturally. The fantasy world provides the wonders; the adventure structure provides the excitement of discovering them.
blends.resolution_strategy: Fantasy provides the world; adventure provides the structure. The blend is inherently stable because fantasy world-building and adventure exploration serve each other.

example_works.title: The Hobbit
example_works.note: Fantasy world-building and adventure journey are inseparable

example_works.title: Pirates of the Caribbean
example_works.note: Fantasy supernatural elements enhance the adventure

compatible_constraints: Both use claustrophobia — psychological through interiority, horror through isolation
Both escalate through revelation of hidden truth
Both rely on uncertainty about what is real or trustworthy

conflicting_constraints.resolution: Perfectly aligned — interiority and dread reinforce each other

blends.tone_synthesis: Psychological horror: the dread comes from inside the protagonist's mind. The horror IS the psychological state.
blends.resolution_strategy: Psychology provides the mechanism (the mind is the battleground); horror provides the emotional register (dread). The blend is inherently stable because the scariest thing in psychological horror is the protagonist's own perception.

example_works.title: Black Swan
example_works.note: Psychological obsession and body horror are inseparable

example_works.title: The Shining
example_works.note: Psychological deterioration IS the horror

compatible_constraints: Both require consequential choices under pressure
Both demand authentic emotional stakes
War provides extreme pressure that drama's interpersonal conflicts require

conflicting_constraints.resolution: Interpersonal drama occurs between combat sequences; combat reveals character
Aligned — war drama is the most serious tone possible

blends.tone_synthesis: War drama: combat provides the crucible, interpersonal relationships provide the meaning. Gravity and seriousness are maximized.
blends.resolution_strategy: War provides the setting and external stakes; drama provides the character relationships that give those stakes meaning. Conditionally stable because combat sequences must serve character development, not replace it.

example_works.title: Saving Private Ryan
example_works.note: Combat sequences serve the dramatic question of what one life is worth
War mission provides the container for intimate character drama

compatible_constraints: Both require emotionally consequential choices
Both require character depth and authenticity
Biography's historical gravity enhances drama's serious tone

conflicting_constraints.drama: Choices must feel consequential, not predetermined (hard)
conflicting_constraints.resolution: Select and compress real events to create dramatic structure; fill gaps with plausible dramatic invention

blends.tone_synthesis: Biographical drama: intimate gravity applied to real events. The audience's knowledge that events are real amplifies the dramatic weight.
blends.resolution_strategy: Biography provides the events and historical constraint; drama provides the structure and emotional arc. Conditionally stable because real events don't always have dramatic shape — compression and selection are required.

example_works.title: Schindler's List
example_works.note: Real events structured as dramatic narrative

example_works.title: The Social Network
example_works.note: Real events compressed into dramatic structure with liberties

compatible_constraints: SF's extrapolated society IS the satirical mirror of our own
SF's intellectual engagement enhances satire's wit
Both rely on premise-driven exploration of what-if scenarios

conflicting_constraints.resolution: Aligned — satirical SF uses intellectual rigor to expose absurdity
The technology's consistent rules create absurd outcomes — the system works exactly as designed, and that's the problem

blends.tone_synthesis: Satirical SF: intellectual curiosity is directed at exposing societal absurdity through speculative extrapolation. The blend is naturally stable when the science fiction premise IS the satirical device.
blends.resolution_strategy: SF provides the speculative world; satire provides the critical lens. The blend works best when the SF premise is a magnifying glass for a real-world absurdity.

example_works.title: Brave New World
example_works.note: SF society IS the satirical target

example_works.title: Wall-E
example_works.note: SF extrapolation of consumerism as satirical commentary

compatible_constraints: Both center on transgression and its investigation
Both use revelation dynamics — uncovering what happened and why
Both require procedural credibility

conflicting_constraints.resolution: The investigation IS morally weighted — understanding the crime means confronting its moral reality

blends.tone_synthesis: Crime mystery: intellectual rigor applied to morally weighted material. The investigation is both a puzzle and a moral reckoning.
blends.resolution_strategy: Mystery provides the investigative structure; crime provides the moral stakes and gritty texture. The blend is inherently stable because crime IS the most common mystery content.

example_works.title: Zodiac
example_works.note: Investigative mystery obsession within crime's moral weight

example_works.title: True Detective (Season 1)
example_works.note: Mystery investigation carries extreme crime-world moral gravity

compatible_constraints: Both feature journeys through challenging landscapes
Both use environmental obstacles as primary challenges
Both value self-reliance and physical competence

conflicting_constraints.resolution: Western adventure is exciting but expressed through stoic competence rather than exuberant wonder
Aligned — the frontier IS resource-scarce

blends.tone_synthesis: Western adventure: the excitement of discovery expressed through stoic competence rather than exuberant wonder. The landscape is both thrilling and unforgiving.
blends.resolution_strategy: Western provides the setting and moral code; adventure provides the journey structure. Conditionally stable because the Western's spare tone and the adventure's excitement can pull in opposite directions.

example_works.title: True Grit
example_works.note: Western moral code structures an adventure journey

example_works.title: The Revenant
example_works.note: Western survival and adventure journey through unforgiving landscape
